name: ts-tips
description: Recency index for TypeScript and Node.js: what shipped that postdates most coding-model training data, verified against official sources rather than memory. Covers TS 4.9 through 6.0.3 (satisfies, using/await using, decorators, isolatedDeclarations) and the tsgo/TypeScript 7 native compiler, Node 20 through 26 runtime features, and the oxc toolchain (oxlint/oxfmt).
